center.name: The Peregrine Fund
center.summary: The Peregrine Fund是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Red-necked buzzard、Madagascar buzzard、Red-thighed sparrowhawk，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Endemic to Madagascar where it is common, except for the deforested central plateau where it is less common, there is some indication that its population is increasing as the forest is fragmented. The Madagascar buzzard is adaptable as to its habitat and is found in a wide variety of habitats including forest, open woodland and regenerating, secondary forest. It can also be found on rocky hillsides up to 2300 metres above sea level. Although it is so adaptable it is still less common on the deforested central plateau

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-necked buzzard prefers forest edges and clearings, including those within secondary and primary forests but it occurs in cultivated areas and is generally absent from the main areas of lowland rainforest up to an altitude of 2,500 metres

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-thighed sparrowhawk is found in lowland primary rainforest, along the forest edges and in clearings, as well as in older secondary forest
